title: Full Stack Developer
responsibilities:
Develop and maintain frontend & backend applications.
Build responsive UI using React / Angular / Vue.
Create APIs and backend services.
Manage databases like MySQL / MongoDB / PostgreSQL.
Debug, test, and optimize applications.
Collaborate with teams in Agile environment.
Use Git, CI/CD, Docker, and cloud platforms.
Ensure security, scalability, and performance.
Review code and support junior developers.
